{{Quote|I don't know how it's supposed to work, but I sure can fix it.|Porgo Goo|<ref name="GG6-1" />}}
'''Porgo Goo''' was a short, plump, furry native of [[Chortose/Legends|Chortose]].

==Biography==
Porgo ran a small repairs shop in the [[Minos Cluster/Legends|Minos Cluster]] with his brothers, who all had natural ability for engineering and repairing [[Starship/Legends|starships]]. None of them had the technical understanding to back up their practical ability but the Goo brothers were not embarrassed by this. The Goo brothers charged the standard rate for their work, but if properly motivated (not with [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], but dares or bets), could complete their work in a third of the usual time needed. The Goo brothers were also perfectly willing to install illegal ship modifications so long as they viewed the modification as being 'cool'.

==Personality and traits==
Porgo was a playful being and enjoyed social gatherings, especially in dangerous [[Cantina/Legends|cantinas]]. Above all else however he loved to fix things that needed fixing.
